title: rubus × collinus
intro: Rubus × collinus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or wild raspberry, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the wild raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus × collinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and colds.
